reference: Sir, my son, aged fifteen months, had a burn injury on his cheeks caused by hot tea. A small area of skin is missing on his cheeks, and it is healing, but will he be able to regain the same color of skin with a patch? We are using Silverx ointment on it. Is this okay, or is there something better you could suggest regarding this concern? Thank you.
text: Sir, my son aged 15, got a running injury on his cheeks caused by hot tea. A small area of skin is removed. Will this wound heal within ten days or will a scar remain instead? Thank you.
